name: Gluten Free Blender Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place buttermilk, eggs, and cooking oil in a blender.
2. Blend at low speed until smooth.
3. Gradually add brown sugar and dry ingredients (baking soda, baking powder, rice flour, potato flour, corn meal, salt).
4. Pour batter into a greased skillet or non-stick pan, forming 6-inch rounds.
5. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and the edges of the pancake appear dull.
6. Adjust consistency by adding more milk for thinner pancakes or more flour for thicker ones.
